title: dopatrium nudicaule
intro: Dopatrium nudicaule, also known as the yellow dodder or yellow doddran, is a perennial plant species native to the tropical forests of West Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Dopatrium nudicaule has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
